details.theme: Global supply-chain disruption from tariffs and trade friction
details.why_it_matters: Rising US tariffs and trade barriers are disrupting industrial input costs and logistics networks, which can affect refining margins, shipping demand, and downstream energy-intensive manufacturing.
example_headlines: The Aluminum Shock Hitting the Global Economy — The global aluminum market is being squeezed by two powerful forces at once: conflict in the Middle East and rising US tariffs
EU frets as China builds an industrial base in Morocco — Billions of dollars of investment raise concerns that subsidised goods could swamp European manufacturers

details.theme: ECB inflation concerns and energy price pass-through
details.why_it_matters: Central bank concern about unanchored inflation from energy shocks could drive tighter monetary policy, affecting global demand and oil prices through economic growth channels.
example_headlines: ECB's Schnabel Sees Risk of Unanchored Inflation Views From War — The European Central Bank can no longer look through the inflationary impact of the war in Iran as price pressures spread beyond energy
Jay Powell warns Federal Reserve is undergoing 'stress test'

details.why_it_matters: High refinery run rates and deferred maintenance reduce crude demand flexibility and could tighten margins if maintenance backlogs create sudden capacity drops.
example_headlines: US Crude Refiners Are Pushing Run Rates to Maximum Levels

details.theme: Venezuela power crisis affecting oil operations
details.why_it_matters: Energy companies forced to self-supply power for oil/gas projects signals deteriorating infrastructure that could constrain production capacity and exports.
example_headlines: Venezuela Wants Oil Firms to Supply Their Own Power for Projects

details.theme: Ukraine strikes on Russian oil infrastructure
details.why_it_matters: Direct attacks on Russian oil terminals and refining capacity reduce global supply and can disrupt export flows from major producer.
example_headlines: Ukraine strikes St Petersburg as Putin's forum gets under way — Kyiv hits oil terminal after deadly Russian strikes on Ukrainian cities
